mapper.select: select id, task_id, user_id, query, intent, result, status, create_time, update_time from ai_task where id = #{id}
select id, task_id, user_id, query, intent, result, status, create_time, update_time from ai_task where task_id = #{taskId}
mapper.insert: insert into ai_task(task_id, user_id, query, intent, result, status, create_time, update_time) values (#{taskId}, #{userId}, #{query}, #{intent}, #{result}, #{status}, now(), now())
mapper.update: update ai_task set status = #{status}, update_time = now() where task_id = #{taskId}
mapper.select: select id, task_id, user_id, query, intent, result, status, create_time, update_time from ai_task where status = #{status} and create_time < #{deadline} limit 100
